_doc: Faithful replay: ConnectorHttpActivity faults with GeneralException DAP-GE-3005 (connection disabled). Signature mined verbatim from failed-job telemetry. First-match-wins.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in the Shared folder to find the failing job (prompt gives no job key).
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the GeneralException DAP-GE-3005 'Connection is disabled' signature and the ConnectorHttpActivity stack frame.
OPTIONAL — agent may ping/list the connection to corroborate the disabled state, but the job Info already names the cause. min:0 means tracked-but-not-required.
